name: search-solar
description: CLI tool for searching solar icons

scripts.build: tsc scripts/parse-icons.ts cli.ts --outDir dist --esModuleInterop --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2020 --declaration false && mkdir dist\data && node -e "import('fs').then(fs=>fs.copyFileSync('data/icons.json','dist/data/icons.json'))"
